nasb.text: or his uncle, or his uncle’s son, may redeem him, or one of his blood relatives from his family may redeem him; or if he prospers, he may redeem himself.

esv.text: or his uncle or his cousin may redeem him, or a close relative from his clan may redeem him. Or if he grows rich he may redeem himself.

cnv.text: 他的叔伯或是他叔伯的兒子可以贖他，他家族中的骨肉至親也可以贖他；如果他自己的經濟能力改善，也可以自贖。

ccb.text: 叔伯、堂兄弟或其他近亲都可以赎回他。如果他富裕起来，也可以赎回自己。
